required_documents: Material composition; size; GSM/weight; colorfastness statement; washing label; packaging photos
quality_checks: Cooling effect; odor; stitching; color bleed; pouch quality; size accuracy
logistics_plan: Domestic direct ship or small-batch 3PL; avoid bulky packaging
after_sales_rule: Refund or replacement for wrong item, severe odor, damaged package, or unusable defect
red_flags: Color bleed; chemical smell; rough edges; inconsistent sizes
next_action: Request 3 supplier quotes and 2 sample sets

required_documents: Material details; washable proof if claimed; applicable fabric list; product source invoice; packaging photos
quality_checks: Hair removal on sofa, blanket, leggings, car seat; handle strength; fabric scratch risk; cleaning chamber usability
logistics_plan: Domestic direct ship or small-batch 3PL; keep package under light parcel threshold
after_sales_rule: Replacement for broken handle or non-working roller; refund only after photo/video proof
red_flags: Scratches fabric; weak effect; copied patented shape; fragile handle
next_action: Ask suppliers for demo videos and patent/IP risk statement

required_documents: Fabric composition; satin/silk proof if claimed; colorfastness; accessory list; English tutorial card
quality_checks: Slip resistance; comfort while sleeping; curl result on different hair types; clip strength; color bleed
logistics_plan: Domestic direct ship or small-batch 3PL; bundle in soft pouch
after_sales_rule: Replacement for missing accessory or damaged clip; avoid guaranteed result claims
red_flags: Fake silk claim; color bleed; weak clip; high return from unmet expectations
next_action: Order limited samples after checking material claims

required_documents: Fabric weight; zipper brand/type; set dimensions; stitching photos; load/zipper test video
quality_checks: Zipper smoothness; compression effect; seam strength; size accuracy; odor
logistics_plan: 3PL or supplier direct ship; verify dimensional weight before pricing
after_sales_rule: Replacement for broken zipper or wrong set; no refund for overpacking damage unless defective
red_flags: Zipper jams; fabric too thin; oversized shipping dimensions; misleading compression claim
next_action: Request zipper test video and packed dimensions before sample

required_documents: MSDS/SDS; UN38.3; battery specification; COC; UL/FCC mark photos if applicable; English safety manual; packaging safety marks
quality_checks: Airflow; noise; charging; heat; runtime; battery labeling; button reliability
logistics_plan: Do not buy inventory before battery compliance check; use only compliant logistics channel
after_sales_rule: Replacement for DOA or charging failure; conservative runtime claims only
red_flags: No battery documents; fake capacity; missing safety labels; loud motor; overheating
next_action: Ask for compliance packet before any sample or listing

required_documents: Material thickness; packed dimensions; drop-test proof; inner foam/packaging photos; scratch protection details
quality_checks: Crack resistance; drawer movement; scratches; packaging protection; dimensional weight
logistics_plan: Only test if shipping quote preserves margin; likely small batch or skip
after_sales_rule: Replacement for cracked item with photo proof; require packaging evidence before refund
red_flags: Cracks; scratches; expensive dimensional shipping; poor drawer fit
next_action: Get 3PL quote and drop-test evidence before sample
